Module 4:
Your Pre-Prelaunch, Part 4
!
Executive Summary
- 	It’s time to start digging into how to build early buzz
- 	The biggest benefit of the Shot Across the Bow is building buzz
!
Part 2: Building Early Buzz
• 	Some characteristics of buzz
• 	Remember that every market is different
• 	Buzz travels most easily through channels that have trust and
authenticity
• 	It’s great to use multiple modalities and media - email, social media,
etc.
• 	A little mystery goes a long way - drop bread crumbs (clues)
everywhere
• 	You want to get the attention of mavens, connectors (as Malcolm
Gladwell calls them), and persons of influence
• 	It’s good to leave breadcrumbs all around the internet and your network
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	It’s as if you’re leaving clues to a mystery - people begin wondering
what’s coming
• 	People love to solve mysteries and be insiders - so telling some
people what’s going on makes them feel involved
• 	Example: PLF 3.0 launch
• 	6-7 weeks before launch I sent an email to JV’s to give them heads
up on 3.0 and get them excited and ready to build buzz
• 	Example: PLF 3.0 call for case studies
• 	I sent out a call for case studies a few weeks before the launch to
PLF owners
• 	Sent them to a link to share their story and case study - even allowed
people that aren’t owners, but used free content to create a
successful launch
• 	This is also a way to let people know something is coming without
selling
!
